Privacy Policy

Last updated: June 2025

1. Information We Collect

We collect information you provide directly to us when you request plumbing services, submit a contact form, or call us at (877) 710-2942. This may include your name, email address, phone number, physical address, and details about your plumbing needs.

2. How We Use Your Information

We use the information we collect to dispatch local plumbing professionals to your location, communicate with you about your service request, process payments, and improve our services. By calling our phone number or filling out a form, you consent to being connected with an independent local plumbing contractor.

3. Information Sharing

Plumbing Local Pros is a free service that assists homeowners in connecting with local service providers. All contractors are independent, and Plumbing Local Pros does not warrant or guarantee any work performed. We share your contact information and service request details exclusively with the independent local plumbing contractor dispatched to assist you.

4. Data Security

We take reasonable measures to help protect information about you from loss, theft, misuse, and unauthorized access, disclosure, alteration, and destruction.

5. Contact Us

If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us by calling (877) 710-2942.

Plumbing Local Pros

Professional local plumbing services across the United States. Available same day and 24/7 for emergencies — drain cleaning, water heater repair, pipe repair, toilet & faucet installation, sewer line services and more.
